data.title: CN Launches C$1 Billion Debt Offering for Strategic Growth
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Canadian National Railway ( (TSE:CNR) ) has shared an announcement.

Canadian National Railway announced a C$1 billion public debt offering, consisting of C$500 million 3.500% Notes due 2030 and C$500 million 4.200% Notes due 2035. The proceeds from this offering are intended for general corporate purposes, including debt refinancing, share repurchases, and potential acquisitions, which could impact the company’s financial strategy and market positioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CNR) stock is a Buy with a C$168.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Canadian National Railway stock, see the TSE:CNR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:CNR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:CNR is a Outperform.

Canadian National Railway’s robust financial performance and positive earnings call guidance are the most significant factors in its overall score. While the technical analysis presents mixed signals and the valuation is fair, the company’s strategic initiatives and resilience in facing macroeconomic challenges provide a solid foundation for future growth.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:CNR stock, click here.

More about Canadian National Railway

Canadian National Railway (CN) operates in the transportation industry, primarily focusing on rail transport services. It is a major player in the North American market, providing freight services across Canada and the United States.

Average Trading Volume: 1,474,491

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$91.23B

data.title: Thorney Opportunities Ltd Hits Record NTA Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Thorney Opportunities Ltd. ( (AU:TOP) ) has provided an announcement.

Thorney Opportunities Ltd reported an increase in its net tangible assets (NTA) to an all-time high of 88.9 cents per share as of May 31, 2025, marking a 2.4% rise from the previous month. The company’s performance was notably driven by gains in AMA Group Limited, despite some offsetting weaknesses in other holdings. Amidst global market volatility, the company remains cautious, holding over $33 million in deployable capital and actively engaging in a share buyback program to address the share price to NTA discount.

More about Thorney Opportunities Ltd.

Thorney Opportunities Ltd (TOP) is an ASX-listed investment company that focuses on investing in both listed and unlisted equities and financial assets across various sectors such as media, automotive, energy, engineering and mining services, and financial services. Managed by Thorney Investment Group, TOP emphasizes careful selection of investments to unlock value in identified companies.

Average Trading Volume: 108,426

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Freehill Mining Achieves High-Grade Magnetite Sample at Yerbas Buenas Mine
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from Freehill Mining Ltd. ( (AU:FHS) ).

Freehill Mining Limited has successfully completed magnetic test work on a bulk sample from its Yerbas Buenas Mine, achieving a product grade of 65.75% Fe. This result supports further test work and planning to recommence magnetite mining, presenting a low capex opportunity for revenue generation and attracting potential customers.

More about Freehill Mining Ltd.

Freehill Mining Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing primarily on the extraction and processing of magnetite. The company owns the Yerbas Buenas Mine in Chile, where it conducts its operations to produce high-grade iron ore concentrates.

data.title: Waterdrop Inc. Reports Strong Q1 2025 Earnings Growth
data.description:
Waterdrop, Inc. ADR Class A ( (WDH) ) has released its Q1 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Waterdrop, Inc. ADR Class A presented to its investors.

Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Waterdrop Inc. is a technology platform focused on insurance and healthcare services, known for its positive social impact and innovative solutions in the industry. In its first quarter of 2025, Waterdrop reported a significant increase in net profit, reaching RMB108.2 million, a 34.2% rise year-over-year, alongside a 7.0% growth in net operating revenue. The company’s insurance business showed robust growth, with first-year premiums increasing by 19.3% year-over-year, and the introduction of new insurance products contributing to this upward trend. Waterdrop also expanded its medical crowdfunding coverage and maintained a strong performance in patient recruitment for clinical trials. Looking ahead, Waterdrop’s management remains optimistic about sustaining growth through strategic innovations and enhanced risk management, aiming to deliver greater value to both users and shareholders.

Cann Group ( (AU:CAN) ) has issued an update.

Cann Group Limited announced the cessation of several securities due to the lapse of conditional rights, as the conditions for these securities were not met or became incapable of being satisfied. This cessation involves a total of 3,795,886 securities, impacting the company’s issued capital and potentially affecting stakeholder interests.
